rss.channel:
Ongoing and Upcoming BLs https://mydramalist.com/list/3kPbQnZ4 Auto-generated feed from MyDramaList list 3kPbQnZ4 <<<<<<< HEAD en-US BL-RSS Auto Generator Mon, 18 May 2026 23:06:59 +0000 Lost to Light (2026) https://mydramalist.com/805160-lost-to-light a8756a0619b45010ad61971030022cb56cbc743cf5f5b8c38a85bfa3c877a9fa ======= Mon, 18 May 2026 22:59:12 +0000 Lost to Light (2026) https://mydramalist.com/805160-lost-to-light Lost to Light (2026)
Thailand, 10 eps
next episode airs in
Next episode in 32 days

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian. “I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former nationalcover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings. Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart. Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure? (Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Sat, 20 Jun 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun (2026) https://mydramalist.com/807074-yatara-yarashii-fukami-kun <<<<<<< HEAD df3caf549807e01c7817fa2c379e3bba70a66850e7b2007bf18bce59202324e8 ======= Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun (2026)
Japan, 10 eps
Air Date: Apr 7, 2026 - ?
next episode airs in
Next episode in 6 days

When secretly judgmental sales ace Kaji discovers the unexpected charm of his seemingly dull colleague Fukami during an overnight trip, their shared views on love ignite a passionate casual arrangement that slowly blossoms into a genuine romance. (Source: TMDb) ~~ Adapted from the manga series "Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun." (やたらやらしい深見くん) by Matsumoto Ayaka (松本あやか).Edit Translation

Seoul Trip (2026) https://mydramalist.com/807888-seoul-trip <<<<<<< HEAD 1bf9da6436c2a760c7a6d4020cf21a613bd62b90fed9047e3d8cd50f3761e362 ======= Seoul Trip (2026)
South Korea, 6 eps
Air Date: Apr 12, 2026 - ?
next episode airs in
Next episode in 5 days

On the first day of my trip to Seoul, I chased down a man I mistook for a pickpocket, only to end up spending the night with him. To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoulaffair. (Source: TMDb)Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Sun, 12 Apr 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Crazy Love, Moo-Moo! (2026) https://mydramalist.com/805718-crazylove-moomoo <<<<<<< HEAD a2fea403c254143c88e39f9e4d794b608e5bee09169b8e5c25c0970f23c79d48 ======= Crazy Love, Moo-Moo! (2026)
Thailand, 10 eps
Air Date: May 9, 2026 - Jul 11, 2026
next episode airs in
Next episode in 4 days

When Hia Fu, the eldest son of a Chinese-Thai family in Kanchanaburi and a full-on hopeless romantic, finds himself trying to win over his younger brother's friend Moo—who clearly states he's not into fair-skinned Chinese guys like him—things are bound to get complicated. The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filledwith intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings. (Source: Viu) ~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Sat, 09 May 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Love upon a Time (2026) https://mydramalist.com/745177-love-upon-a-time <<<<<<< HEAD 61b6ab27626b7f4083647d00dcbee141e7e9cf1f34588381b4c7e5e6efcb2652 ======= Love upon a Time (2026)
Thailand, 12 eps
Air Date: Mar 27, 2026 - Jun 12, 2026
next episode airs in
Next episode in 3 days

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period. Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is theyounger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him. (Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList) ~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Fri, 27 Mar 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Check in to You (2026) https://mydramalist.com/809204-check-in-to-you <<<<<<< HEAD 034fdd04ffb06e7667df8a96031203aa67d4a07e8d2d6be40e94104c872caa73 ======= Check in to You (2026)
South Korea, 6 eps
next episode airs in
Next episode in 2 days

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedlyfind themselves falling deeply for one another. (Source: Strongberry.kr)Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Thu, 21 May 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Wishing upon the Shooting Stars (2026) https://mydramalist.com/750955-wishing-upon-the-shooting-stars <<<<<<< HEAD fb2b420d50c36d29c141ecb948af0ef73b923ef165090ecd18693fc9f902d022 ======= Wishing upon the Shooting Stars (2026)
Taiwan, 12 eps
Air Date: Mar 26, 2026 - Jun 4, 2026
next episode airs in
Next episode in 2 days

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront histrue desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery. (Source: MyDramaList) ~~ Adapted from the novel "Kuan Kan Liu Hsing Te Cheng Chueh Fang Shih" (觀看流星的正確方式) by Chung Min Jui (鍾旻瑞).Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Love You Teacher (2026) https://mydramalist.com/780108-love-you-teacher <<<<<<< HEAD 4e47111a664b61932b49f363c372ce841da671ff568b2af7b076cbac657a3c4e ======= Love You Teacher (2026)
Thailand, 10 eps
Air Date: Mar 14, 2026 - May 16, 2026

Elementary school teacher Pobmek doesn't like kids, but his boyfriend Teacher Solar does, and he likes Solar more than enough to make up for it. When he suffers an accident, however, Solar is left with brain damage, reverting mentally at times to the age of seven. After he takes "Nong Sun" back home, there are days when Pobmek doesn't get any respite from children. (Source: MyDramaList)Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Sat, 14 Mar 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Sweet Blood (2026) https://mydramalist.com/804094-sweet-blood <<<<<<< HEAD dee453063e6f036645d798c881e4626385b72ece0ca7daeafefc850766953ef3 ======= Sweet Blood (2026)
South Korea, 8 eps
Air Date: Mar 11, 2026 - Mar 30, 2026

On the night of a blue moon lunar eclipse that happens once in ten years, the portal between the vampire world, where drinking human blood is forbidden, and the human world opens. Lucifer, a vampire prince who desperately craves human blood, descends into the human world. Min U, a university student in his early twenties, moves to the city from the countryside. He works tirelessly, day and night, to save up fortuition while also studying hard. However, Min U contracts a rare disease that puts his life at risk whenever he bleeds. One day, Min U becomes a victim of a hit-and-run accident, bleeding and finding himself in a life-threatening situation. Lucifer, drawn by the scent of blood, attacks Min U. However, something strange happens: Lucifer collapses, and Min U miraculously survives, unharmed. (Source: Korean = plfil.com || Translation = MyDramaList)Edit Translation

>>>>>>> b2a39162bff0523d0d08a5f1ef2f6f4d29a60ff0 Wed, 11 Mar 2026 00:00:00 +0000

Laundry Romance (2026) https://mydramalist.com/804990-laundry-romance <<<<<<< HEAD dc8345fc28ae5a24759295de7d7f12ab6ea20c7aa1db5dd851c0529188310b4d ======= Laundry Romance (2026)
South Korea, 4 eps
Air Date: Feb 3, 2026 - Feb 24, 2026

Life, like clothes, sometimes gets wrinkled and shriveled. Jae Min, a 30-year-old job seeker who lives with anxiety that clings to him like grime, and Ji Seok, a 34-year-old voluntary unemployed person who threw away his well-ironed shirt and chose to stop. A healing romance between two men that blends in with the noise of the washing machines running late at night at a coin laundromat. (Source: Korean = filmmakers.co.kr || Translation = MyDramaList)Edit Translation

South Korea, 6 eps
Air Date: Jan 12, 2026 - Feb 17, 2026

Yun Jae accidentally enters Do Hyeon’s apartment while drunk, and their first meeting begins with an unexpected kiss. Afterward, they keep running into each other in the same apartment complex and gradually grow closer. Yun Jae finds himself drawn to Do Hyeon, while Do Hyeon, quiet and reserved, also begins to develop feelings for him. (Source: QueerDeep YouTube)Edit Translation
